description: Master listing of all DANDI Cache repositories: up-to-date pre-computed mappings commonly used by developers working with the DANDI Archive.

superdataset.note: Each cache is registered as a DataLad subdataset under the 'caches/' directory for easy immediate retrieval.

template.name: cache-template
template.description: A common template with suggested structure, layout, and mechanisms for a typical DANDI Cache.

caches.name: content-id-to-dandiset-paths
caches.description: Maps content ID relationship to current Dandiset paths.

caches.name: content-id-to-unique-dandiset-path
caches.description: A subset of `content-id-to-dandiset-paths` which have been identified to have only a single correspondence.

caches.name: content-id-to-usage-dandiset-path
caches.description: Adaptation of `content-id-to-unique-dandiset-path` for temporarily resolving all remaining content links to some Dandiset.

caches.name: usage-dandiset-path-to-asset-size
caches.description: Map each asset in usage-dandiset-path to its size in bytes.

caches.name: qualifying-aind-content-ids
caches.description: A subset of `content-id-to-nwb-files` which have been identified to qualify for the AIND ephys pipeline.

caches.name: dandi-validations
caches.description: Derivative dataset of validation outputs for all published Dandiset versions.

caches.name: content-id-to-dandiset-paths-old
caches.description: A cache of the content ID relationship to current Dandiset paths. Updated frequently.
